creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 172133
multimedia/qmmp: Switch version from 0.10.0 to 0.10.1

qmmp version 0.10.1 has been released.  This upgraded product
includes updated/revised traslation of Russian, Ukrainian, and
 Portuguese, and bugfix of skinnedUI on Cinnamon/GNOME3/Mate
window managers.

The latest options helper for CMake boolean flags is used.
Temporary bugfix patch is also added.
